---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that doesn't work as expected
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**To reproduce**
Steps to reproduce — ideally the exact `triagekit build` command and a minimal
`triage.config.yml` (with **no real repo names or tokens**).

**Expected behavior**
What you expected instead.

**Environment**
- triagekit version: <!-- npx triagekit --version, or the npm version -->
- Node version: <!-- node --version -->
- OS / browser:
- Build mode: generic (`--generic`) / compiled

**Anything else**
Console errors, screenshots (scrub any private repo names / tokens), etc.

> ⚠️ Never paste a personal access token, real repo/org names, or other private
> data into a public issue.
